articles.title: Bitcoin surpasses Silver market cap, becomes world’s 8th largest asset
articles.description: Bitcoins market cap has reached a new milestone, surpassing silver with a valuation of $1.736 trillion, making it the worlds 8th largest asset, according to Companies Market Cap website.World's largest assets by market cap (Companies Market Cap)This achievement comes as Bitcoins price surged past $88,000 today, gaining 10% on the day, while silver fell 2%, allowing Bitcoin to leap ahead.With...

articles.title: Bitcoin Hits New All-Time High of $88K!
articles.description: Bitcoin hits a new all-time high of $88K, edging closer to the $100K milestone as post-election optimism fuels investor demand.

articles.title: Cardano Soars as Hoskinson Hits “'Wolf Mode” on Ketamine
articles.description: Cardano breaks out of a multi-month slump following Charles Hoskinson's admission of a ketamine-induced wolf transformation.

articles.title: MicroStrategy buys $2B in Bitcoin, boosts holdings to $23B
articles.description: MicroStrategy’s latest announcement shows that its Bitcoin holdings have reached 279,420 BTC, worth almost $23 billion.

articles.title: MicroStrategy shares rise 10% after $2 billion Bitcoin acquisition at $74.4k
articles.description: MicroStrategy has announced a major Bitcoin acquisition, securing approximately 27,200 BTC for $2.03 billion between Oct. 31 and Nov. 10, according to a Nov. 11 statement. This purchase comes amid a broader crypto market rally that has seen Bitcoin price rally to a new all-time high of more than $82,000. However, the Michael Saylor-led company […] The post MicroStrategy shares rise 10% after...

articles.title: Solana’s price surge propels its market cap past $100 billion, outpacing Bitcoin and Ethereum gains
articles.description: Since Donald Trump’s reelection as US president, Bitcoin and Ethereum have drawn substantial attention with notable price increases. However, Solana has quietly outperformed these two giants in the digital asset space. Data from CryptoSlate indicates Solana’s price has surged over 34% in the past week to as high as $215, surpassing Bitcoin’s 20% gain to […] The post Solana’s price surge...

articles.title: Cardano Rallies as Trump Rumors Spark Investor Hopes
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) rebounded in November due to speculation around founder Charles Hoskinson’s potential involvement in the Trump administration.
